name: c/d multicare dry dog food with chicken bag
description: bladder stones are collections of mineral crystals that combine together in the urinary tract. they can cause discomfort and lead to more serious problems that require the care of a veterinarian. hill's nutritionists & veterinarians developed prescription diet c/d multicare clinical nutrition specially formulated to support a dog's urinary health and reduce the risk of struvite and calcium oxalate stones. this dry food has an irresistible chicken flavour that dogs will love.
